title: Ja'far's Alleged Connivance with,the Release of the 'Alid Yahya b. 'Abdallah b. Hasan
description: of the 'Alid Yaliyd b. 'Abdalldh b. Masan Abu Muhammad al-Yazidi705 -and according to what is said, he was one of the persons most knowledgeable about the story of the Barmakis-has mentioned, saying: "If anyone says that al-Rashid killed Ja'far b. Yabyi for any other reason but over Yabyi b. 'Abdallah b. Hasan, don't believe him!"706 The story here is that alRashid handed over Yabyi to Ja'far, who thereupon imprisoned him.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
